name: 16p11_2_distal_SH2B1
description: 16p11.2 distal recurrent microdeletion/duplication region (~220 kb), flanked by directly oriented SDs. Distinct from the more proximal 16p11.2 region. Associated with obesity (SH2B1 dosage) and developmental delay.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of ~30-50 kb at >99% identity mediate recurrent ~220 kb CNV; unique segment contains SH2B1, ATXN2L, TUFM, ATP2A1, SBK1.
